notes: Fill paymentLink values with live Razorpay Payment Links from the Razorpay dashboard or API. Do not store Razorpay key_secret in this static website repo.

items.title: Website & Lead Capture — Starter
items.description: 3-page mobile-first website, WhatsApp/call links, enquiry form, metadata and launch checklist.

items.title: Website & Lead Capture — Standard
items.description: 5-page website, detailed copy, Google Business Profile setup and post-launch revision.

items.title: Operations Automation — Starter
items.description: Lead/task tracker, follow-up stages, templates and owner dashboard.

items.title: Operations Automation — Standard
items.description: Process map, automation triggers, CRM/sheet integration and 30-day check-in.

items.title: DPDP Website Compliance — Starter
items.description: Privacy notice and trust gap review, consent/forms notes, vendor register and roadmap.

items.title: DPDP Website Compliance — Standard
items.description: Starter scope plus rights request, breach readiness, grievance notes and 90-day review.
